title: pilosella cymosa var. pubescens
intro: Pilosella cymosa var. pubescens, also known as the woolly mouse-ear hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Pilosella cymosa var. pubescens include its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and act as a natural antiseptic agent. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
